title: File Hash Checker
description: Compute MD5 / SHA-1 / SHA-256 / SHA-512 locally; multi-file batch, auto-match expected hash, copy & download
disclaimer: Files never leave your browser: MD5 is implemented in pure JS, SHA-* via Web Crypto API. Everything runs locally.

drop.hint: Drag files here, or click the button to choose

compare.label: Expected hash
compare.placeholder: Paste expected hex hash — e.g. SHA-256 from a download page…
compare.unknown: Not a valid hex hash string
